name: Tranexamic Acid
description: A powerful ingredient known for fading melasma and stubborn dark spots.
scientificSummary: Blocks the interaction between melanocytes and keratinocytes, reducing melanin synthesis.
mechanismOfAction: Blocks the interaction between melanocytes and keratinocytes, reducing melanin synthesis.
